common.tagline: A chronicle for the wanderers of Middle-earth

hero.eyebrow: From the Red Book of Westmarch
hero.title: Walk the roads of Middle-earth
hero.subtitle: Choose your kindred, track the tales you have read, and measure how deep your love of the legendarium truly runs.

artifact.title: The One Ring
artifact.caption: Forged in the fires of Mount Doom, bearer of a hidden inscription
artifact.runeNote: One Ring to rule them all, One Ring to find them

lore.title: An age of myth and memory
lore.body: From the music of the Ainur to the breaking of the Last Alliance, Middle-earth holds an age of song, sorrow, and quiet courage. Here every reader becomes a keeper of those tales, gathering the deeds of wizards, kings, and humble folk of the Shire.

ages.title: The Ages of the World
ages.intro: Time in Arda is reckoned in great Ages, each marked by the rise and fall of powers.

firstAge.title: The First Age
firstAge.body: The Elder Days, lit by the Two Trees of Valinor. Feanor wrought the Silmarils, and for them the Noldor waged the long, doomed wars against Morgoth in Beleriand — the tales of Beren and Luthien, of Turin, and of the fall of Gondolin. The Age ended when the Valar cast Morgoth into the Void and the sea swallowed Beleriand.

secondAge.title: The Second Age
secondAge.body: An age of forging and pride. In Eregion the Elven-smiths made the Rings of Power, and in secret Sauron forged the One in the fires of Orodruin to rule them all. Numenor rose to glory and drowned in ruin, and the Last Alliance of Elves and Men cast Sauron down — though the One Ring was not destroyed.

thirdAge.title: The Third Age
thirdAge.body: The waning of the Elves and the long watch against a returning Shadow. Found by Smeagol, lost in the dark, and carried at last out of the Shire by a hobbit, the One Ring set the War of the Ring in motion — ending when it was unmade in the Cracks of Doom.

fourthAge.title: The Fourth Age
fourthAge.body: The Dominion of Men begins. Aragorn reigns as King Elessar over the Reunited Kingdom, the Ring-bearers pass over the Sea with the last of the Eldar, and the world steps out of legend into the history we know.

cta.title: The road goes ever on
cta.body: Speak the password, choose your character, and let your tale be counted among the great ones.

gallery.title: Visions of Middle-earth
gallery.subtitle: Illuminations from the deep lore — havens, eagles, and the Ring that binds them.

rivendell.title: Rivendell, the Last Homely House
rivendell.caption: Imladris, refuge of Elrond, where the Council was held and the Fellowship was formed.

ring.title: The One Ring awakens
ring.caption: Cast into fire, the hidden inscription burns into view: one Ring to rule them all.

autumn.title: Imladris in autumn
autumn.caption: The hidden valley beneath the Misty Mountains, golden in the failing light of the Elves.

eagle.title: The Eagles of Manwe
eagle.caption: Gwaihir the Windlord bears Gandalf from the pinnacle of Orthanc, above the ring of Isengard.

ringGrass.title: The Ring in the green
ringGrass.caption: Lost in the Gladden Fields and the long grass of ages, its Elvish letters still aglow.

treebeard.title: Treebeard of Fangorn
treebeard.caption: Fangorn the Ent — oldest of the Onodrim, shepherd of the trees. Merry and Pippin meet him in the ancient forest, and he rouses the Ents to march on Isengard.

eagleRescue.title: Borne by the Eagles
eagleRescue.caption: The Great Eagles of the Misty Mountains, servants of Manwë. Gwaihir the Windlord carries Gandalf out of peril more than once across the wild peaks.

shire.title: The Shire
shire.caption: The green and gentle homeland of the Hobbits in Eriador — rolling fields, quiet rivers, and the humble folk whose courage shapes the fate of the world.

rivendellSketch.title: Rivendell (concept)
rivendellSketch.caption: An early study of Imladris, the House of Elrond, where the Council of Elrond is held and the Fellowship of the Ring is chosen.

rivendellColour.title: The Last Homely House
rivendellColour.caption: Rivendell in full colour — a refuge of healing and lore hidden in a deep valley beneath the Misty Mountains, where the wise gather.

moriaGate.title: The West-gate of Moria
moriaGate.caption: The Doors of Durin before the dark waters of the Sirannon. 'Speak, friend, and enter' — the password is the Elvish word for friend: mellon.

saruman.title: The Ruin of Isengard
saruman.caption: Saruman the White amid the fires and felled trees of Isengard, where he breeds the Uruk-hai. Once head of the Order, he is corrupted by his hunger for power.

lothlorien.title: Caras Galadhon
lothlorien.caption: The golden wood of Lothlórien, realm of Galadriel and Celeborn. The Fellowship rests among the mallorn-trees and the high flets of the Galadhrim.

shelob.title: Shelob's Lair
shelob.caption: The great spider Shelob lurks in the tunnels of Cirith Ungol. Only the Phial of Galadriel — bearing the light of Eärendil's star — can drive her back into the dark.

timeline.title: A Chronicle of the Ages
timeline.intro: A few of the turning points that shaped Arda, from the awakening of the Firstborn to the passing of the Ring.

awakening.title: The Elves Awaken
awakening.body: The Firstborn wake at Cuivienen beneath the stars, and the long history of the Eldar begins.

rings.title: The Rings of Power
rings.body: The Elven-smiths of Eregion forge the Rings; Sauron secretly makes the One in Mount Doom.

lastAlliance.title: The Last Alliance
lastAlliance.body: Elves and Men defeat Sauron; Isildur takes the One Ring but will not destroy it.

gollum.title: Smeagol and the Ring
gollum.body: Deagol finds the Ring in the Anduin; Smeagol murders for it and withers into Gollum.

bilbo.title: Found by a Hobbit
bilbo.body: Bilbo Baggins finds the Ring in Gollum's cave during the quest of Erebor.

warOfRing.title: The War of the Ring
warOfRing.body: Frodo bears the Ring to Mordor; it is unmade in the Cracks of Doom and the Third Age ends.

footer.text: A fan-made tribute to the works of J.R.R. Tolkien. Not affiliated with the Tolkien Estate.
footer.disclaimer: This is a non-commercial, open-source fan project built for educational purposes. All rights and imagery belong to their respective owners (Tolkien Estate / Warner Bros).

auth.doorSubtitle: Lord of Moria. Speak, friend, and enter.
auth.inscription: Ennyn Durin Aran Moria: pedo mellon a minno
auth.displayNamePlaceholder: Enter a name, or leave it to your kindred
auth.displayNameHint: Leave blank to be known by your character's name.
auth.errorGeneric: The doors will not open. Try again.
auth.errorNoCharacter: Choose a character before you enter.
auth.usernamePlaceholder: Your name in the Red Book
auth.errorInvalidCredentials: Those words ring false — wrong username or password.
auth.errorUsernameTaken: That name is already spoken for. Choose another.
auth.errorUsernameShort: Username must be at least 3 characters.
auth.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorNetwork: Could not reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
auth.errorValidation: Please check the form and try again.

saruman.title: The White Wizard
saruman.tagline: Head of the Order of Istari

aragorn.title: Heir of Isildur
aragorn.tagline: King Elessar of the Reunited Kingdom

sam.title: The Gardener
sam.tagline: The most faithful of the Shire

boromir.title: Captain of Gondor
boromir.tagline: Son of the Steward of Minas Tirith

gollum.title: Smeagol
gollum.tagline: Keeper of riddles in the dark

greeting.gandalf: A wizard is never late, nor is he early. He arrives precisely when he means to.
greeting.legolas: The stars are veiled, yet your eyes stay keen. Welcome, Greenleaf.
greeting.saruman: Against the power of Mordor there can be no victory — yet here, you are most welcome.
greeting.aragorn: There is always hope. Be welcome — the hands of the king are the hands of a healer.
greeting.gimli: And my axe! Good to see you — a dwarf never forgets a friend.
greeting.sam: I made a promise, Mr. Frodo. Welcome home — second breakfast is on me.
greeting.frodo: I am glad you are here with me, at the end of all things. Welcome back.
greeting.boromir: Gondor welcomes you. The horn of the White City sounds for your return.
greeting.gollum: Welcome back, my Precious! We missed you, yes we did, gollum, gollum.

fanMeter.title: LOTR Fan Meter
fanMeter.profileIncomplete: Complete your profile for more points

books.title: The Reading Quest
books.subtitle: Mark each tale as you finish it.

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.namePlaceholder: Enter a name, or leave it to your kindred

avatar.errorType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG or WebP image.
avatar.errorSize: Image must be 5 MB or smaller.
